title: hieracium inuloides subsp. hirtellum
intro: Hieracium inuloides subsp. hirtellum, also known as hairy hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium inuloides subsp. hirtellum include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
